Headline: Loop-bound Brown and Purple Line Service Running with Delays
ShortDescription: Loop-bound Brown and Purple Line trains are running with delays near Belmont due to signal problems.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Loop-bound Brown and Purple Line trains are running with delays near Belmont due to signal problems.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore normal service. Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Kimball-bound Brown and Linden-bound Purple Line Service Running with Delays
ShortDescription: Kimball-bound Brown and Linden-bound Purple Line trains are running with delays near Belmont due to an earlier mechanical problem.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Kimball-bound Brown and Linden-bound Purple Line trains are running with delays near Belmont due to an earlier mechanical problem.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

Bus shuttles have been requested from Kimball to Belmont in both directions to provide connecting service.

Personnel are working to restore normal service. Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Orange Line trains bypassing Western
ShortDescription: Orange Line trains are running, but not stopping at Western due to police activity.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Orange Line trains are running, but not stopping at Western due to police activity.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines. 

We apologize for this inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.
